id.description: Stable unique identifier used as the keyed list identity.

sequence.description: Optional monotonically increasing integer stream sequence used to detect missed events.

datetime.description: Machine-readable ISO 8601 datetime string rendered into `<time datetime>`.

timestamp.description: Human-readable timestamp label (e.g. "12:04:32", "2m ago"). Falls back to `datetime`.

severity.description: Severity tone that drives visual styling and the accessible label prefix.

source.description: Origin label identifying which service, worker, or activity produced the event.

details.description: Optional structured JSON payload. Rendered in a collapsible JsonViewer.

id.description: Stable unique identifier used as the keyed list identity.

datetime.description: Optional machine-readable ISO 8601 datetime string for the reconnect moment.

timestamp.description: Optional human-readable timestamp label. Falls back to `datetime` when rendered.

replayedCount.description: Non-negative integer count of events replayed after the connection resumed.

events.description: Events and additive boundary entries to render in chronological order, oldest first.

connectionState.description:
Current connection state. When provided, renders a StatusDot in the toolbar.
Omit when the stream has no live transport.

followLatest.description:
When true, new events automatically scroll the list to the bottom.
Set to false to pause follow-latest (e.g. while the user reads earlier events).
Bindable so the parent can read the paused state the component sets internally.

truncated.description:
Whether to show the "events were truncated" notice. This is a boolean flag,
not a count: the viewer never slices `events` itself. Set it to `true` when
you have already trimmed the array (e.g. capped retention) and want users to
know earlier events are not shown.

loading.description:
Show a loading skeleton instead of the event list. Use while the first
batch of events is in flight.

label.description:
Accessible label for the event list region. Required for accessibility.
Defaults to "Event stream".

detectSequenceGaps.description:
Enables sequence-gap markers when `events` is the complete, unfiltered
stream. Leave false for retained windows, severity-filtered subsets, search
results, or any other caller-trimmed event array.

filterQuery.description: Current filter query value, for controlled usage. Pairs with `onfilter`.

class.description: Additional CSS classes applied to the root element.

unsupportedProps.name: oncopyvisible
unsupportedProps.description:
Callback fired when the user clicks the "Copy visible" toolbar action.
Receives the text of all currently visible events. When omitted the copy
action is hidden.

unsupportedProps.name: onfilter
unsupportedProps.description:
Callback fired when the user updates the filter query in the toolbar's
search field. The consumer is responsible for filtering `events` in
response. When omitted the filter input is hidden.
